name: Cop Slide
content: Before travelling to Boston, I had asked a friend who had lived in Boston about things I should see, and he immediately responded with “cop slide” as his only recommendation. I was incredibly sleep deprived when I arrived in Boston around midnight and started to wander downtown in search of food and the subway station. The cop slide, while it was on my bucket list, was not something I was looking for that night. But Lo, out of the darkness emerged the towering structure of the cop slide; the hunger in my stomach and dreariness in my feet were lifted. I know not what powers drew me directly to the cop slide, but sometimes you just gotta trust those higher powers. The cop slide itself was pretty fun, I found some dinner at a 7-11, and caught the last Orange Line train to the place I was staying for the night. The cop slide is located at the government center, and is named after a video of a police officer shooting out of the slide at excessive speeds. During the summer, the cop slide is normally not as slippery as the video makes it out to be, though results may vary in the colder months.
